entity.summary: Conflux concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange and stablecoin marketplace with residual protocol liquidity and historical spot trading activity but no recent volume in the reviewed registry snapshot.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Ginseng Swap as a Conflux concentrated-liquidity stablecoin marketplace and reports residual TVL and historical cumulative DEX volume, but zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour volume in the reviewed snapshot. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead status. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Ginseng Swap project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: Ginseng Swap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Ginseng Swap as a Conflux CLMM and stablecoin marketplace and reports residual TVL, historical cumulative DEX volume, and zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour volume, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: Ginseng Swap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Ginseng Swap as a Conflux decentralized exchange.
